en_title: Nintendo Confirms Switch 1 Global Availability After Announcing European Withdrawal
cn_title: 任天堂确认Switch 1仍会在欧洲外销售
subtitle: 不是全球停售
opus_summary: 任天堂确认，Switch 1将在欧洲停售后继续于其他地区销售。欧洲市场则会在新电池法规下转向新版Switch 2硬件，但全球下架暂未发生。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has confirmed it will continue selling the Switch 1 after announcing yesterday that the console would be pulled from sale in Europe.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂确认，即便昨天宣布将在欧洲停售Switch 1，这台主机仍会继续销售。

paragraphs.en: Europe is getting refreshed Switch 2 hardware and controllers this fall with user-replaceable batteries, in response to EU legislation. The aging Switch 1 will not receive the same update and will be removed from sale in the region from mid-February next year.
paragraphs.cn: 为应对欧盟法规，欧洲将在今年秋季迎来配备用户可更换电池的新版Switch 2硬件和手柄。已经进入生命周期后期的Switch 1不会获得同样更新，并将从明年2月中旬起在该地区下架。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo’s original messaging, including a line that suggested Switch 1 may no longer be manufactured, raised questions about whether the company was eyeing a global retirement for the system around spring 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂最初的说法中包括一句暗示Switch 1可能不再生产的表述，这引发外界疑问：公司是否打算在2027年春季前后让这台主机在全球退场。

paragraphs.en: In a new statement to IGN, Nintendo said its current plan is to keep selling Switch 1 outside Nintendo of Europe territories, including in North America and Japan.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂在给IGN的新声明中表示，目前计划是在任天堂欧洲辖区之外继续销售Switch 1，包括北美和日本。

paragraphs.en: “We will continue selling Nintendo Switch hardware outside of Nintendo of Europe,” the company said.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂表示：「我们将继续在任天堂欧洲以外地区销售Nintendo Switch硬件。」

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Nintendo of Europe said customers would be able to buy Switch 1 throughout 2026. Despite Switch 2’s launch, Switch 1 still has new games on the way, including this month’s Rhythm Heaven Groove, and remains the cheaper option.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，任天堂欧洲表示消费者在2026年全年仍可购买Switch 1。尽管Switch 2已经发售，Switch 1平台仍有新游戏推出，包括本月的《节奏天国 奇迹之星》，而且价格也更低。

paragraphs.en: “Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch Lite and Nintendo Switch OLED Model will continue to be manufactured in 2026 and will be widely available in Europe throughout the year,” Nintendo of Europe said. “From mid-February 2027, Nintendo will no longer sell Nintendo Switch family hardware to retailers.”
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂欧洲表示：「Nintendo Switch、Nintendo Switch Lite和Nintendo Switch OLED款将在2026年继续生产，并在全年于欧洲广泛供应。从2027年2月中旬起，任天堂将不再向零售商销售Nintendo Switch系列硬件。」

paragraphs.en: Europe may have beaten North America at the World Cup, but its loss of Switch 1 sales will not affect the rest of the world.
paragraphs.cn: 欧洲或许在世界杯上击败了北美，但它失去Switch 1销售，并不会影响世界其他地区。

translated_terms.Rhythm Heaven Groove: 节奏天国 奇迹之星
